strategy: No prior analysis available — start with the most impactful baseline optimisation.

bottleneck.bottleneck_summary: All memory accesses miss both L1 and L2 caches, making the kernel completely memory‑bound.
recommendations: Reorder data accesses to achieve coalesced 64‑byte loads/stores
Stage frequently reused data in __local (LDS) to cut global traffic
Align structures and arrays to 64‑byte boundaries
Reduce overall global memory reads/writes where possible
